name: Tank Obliterator
notes: Rail gun: lineAttack fires a 1-hex-wide beam from its own hex through the target and out to `range` (5) hexes total, hitting every enemy squad along the line and hard-stopping at the first building in its path (which takes the hit as the beam's terminal target, same as any other victim) — see CombatResolver._apply_line_attack/_beam_hexes and 05-troop-stat-schema.md. Chose a plain slow attackSpeed (0.2, ~5s cycle, matching Earthshaker's) over a multi-tick channel-then-recharge model: the sim's attack loop already resolves one full volley per banked attack_progress unit (see combat_resolver.gd's header comment), so a channel would need brand-new per-squad state (active/recharging, what a freeze mid-channel even means) for no clear gameplay payoff over 'slow cycle, one big beam' — same shape every other heavy hitter in the roster already uses. Anti-blob/anti-formation niche: punishes enemies stacked or lined up behind each other, rather than Earthshaker's single-point splash or Granite Crumbler's pure siege range. Still weak vs. Structure/Defensive (0.6x) so it doesn't outclass the dedicated siege units despite the beam's reach.
